changes.old: Integration with Jobber CRM is required.
changes.new: Vendor will use the client company's website to train the AI agent.

changes.old: Calls received after business hours or on weekends are forwarded to Ben or a designated team member; emergency calls are routed immediately to the owner, while non‑emergency calls may be placed in voicemail or a general queue.
changes.new: Policy is to return the call the next business day.

changes.old: Ben is planning to incorporate the sole proprietorship soon and will add an operations manager (Greg) for admin tasks. A membership/club program is being considered for priority scheduling and discounts. The client expects to grow to five employees by year‑end.
changes.new: Follow-up meeting scheduled for Friday at 2:00 PM to review the setup.
